meaning: n.民主党人adj. 美国民主党的
examples: The strongest challenger, Texas Democrat Martin Frost, has withdrawn from the race.
The election may not be the traditional two-horse race between the preferred Democrat and Republican party candidates.
The governorship went to a Democrat, Mrs. Anne Richards.
Senator HARRY REID (Democrat, Nevada): This is all a distraction by the White House.
That ranges far left as Democrat Dennis Kucinich, and as far right as this conservative Republican.
